mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rooms rm WHERE rm.deleted_at IS NULL
AND rm.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}

SELECT rm.id, rm.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, rm.name, rm.capacity, rm.version, rm.created_at, rm.updated_at, COUNT(rh.id) AS current_occupancy FROM rooms rm LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN residence_histories rh ON rh.room_id = rm.id AND rh.check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date >= CURDATE()) AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rm.id = #{id} AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY rm.id, rm.dormitory_id, d.name, rm.name, rm.capacity, rm.version, rm.created_at, rm.updated_at
SELECT rm.id, rm.dormitory_id, rm.name, rm.capacity, rm.version, rm.created_at, rm.updated_at, rm.deleted_at FROM rooms rm WHERE rm.id = #{id} AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT rm.id, rm.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, rm.name, rm.capacity, rm.version, rm.created_at, rm.updated_at, 0 AS current_occupancy FROM rooms rm LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rm.deleted_at IS NULL AND rm.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND rm.id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT rh.room_id FROM residence_histories rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.check_in_date <= #{date} AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date > #{date}) ) ORDER BY rm.name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms (dormitory_id, name, capacity, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{dormitoryId}, #{name}, #{capacity}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE rooms SET dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}, name = #{name}, capacity = #{capacity}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rooms SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_histories WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND check_out_date IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, dormitory_id, name, capacity, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM rooms WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY name ASC

SELECT rm.id, rm.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, rm.name, rm.capacity, rm.version, rm.created_at, rm.updated_at, COUNT(CASE WHEN rh.id IS NOT NULL AND rh.check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date >= CURDATE()) AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS current_occupancy FROM rooms rm LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN residence_histories rh ON rh.room_id = rm.id AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rm.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY rm.id, rm.dormitory_id, d.name, rm.name, rm.capacity, rm.version, rm.created_at, rm.updated_at ORDER BY rm.id ASC
